search_candidates.content: "Cash Cow" dari RKEF dan "Growth Engine" dari HPAL Cost Leadership Melalui Integrasi Hulu-Hilir Resiliensi Finansial yang Kuat & Utilisasi Aset yang Efisien NCKL mengoperasikan 2 jenis smelter nikel, yakni smelter RKEF (untuk bahan baku Stainless Steel) sebagai mesin pencetak uang (cash cow) maupun smelter HPAL (untuk bahan baku baterai EV) yang menjadi motor pertumbuhan (growth engine) utama bagi emiten NCKL Di tengah koreksi harga nikel, pendapatan NCKL naik sebesar 13% di Rp26,97 triliun pada tahun 2024. Nikel Sulfat Kobalt Sulfat Product Portofolio Penambangan Produk Smelter RKEF (Rotary Kiln Electric Furnace) Produk Smelter HPAL (High-Pressure Acid Leaching) MHP (Mixed Hydroxide Precipitate) Hasil Pengolahan Bijih Limonit Bijih Saprolit Bijih Nikel yang berkadar Tinggi Bijih Limonit Bijih Nikel yang berkadar Rendah, namun kaya akan Besi (Fe) dan Kobalt (Co) FeNi (Feronikel) Hasil Pengolahan Bijih Saprolit Digunakan sebagai Bahan Baku Stainless Steel Digunakan sebagai Bahan Baku Baterai EV NCKL’s Business Model: Terintegrasi secara Vertikal antara Tambang hingga Smelter Business Model Pertambangan Nikel di Pulau Obi NCKL mengoperasikan berbagai tambangnya di Pulau Obi melalui beberapa entitas aktif seperti PT NCKL (Trimegah Bangun Persada) & PT GPS (Gane Permai Sentosa) maupun entitas prospek seperti PT GTS (Gane Tambang Sentosa), PT JMP (Jikodolong Megah Pertiwi), dan PT OAM (Obi Anugerah Mineral).

dividend for the fiscal year of 2022 to the shareholders as approved by the AGMS dated June 28, 2023, with the total value of dividend amounted to IDR1.4 trillion or IDR22.18 3 Agustus | August 3 per share. PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk Laporan Tahunan 2023 Annual Report 15 IKHTISAR KINERJA Performance Highlights Perseroan bersama Kementerian Koordinator Bidang Kemaritiman dan Investasi (Kemenko Marves) Republik Indonesia mendukung Aksi #BersamaHijaukanIndonesia dengan kegiatan menanam 15.000 bibit mangrove di lahan seluas 3 hektare, melepasliarkan mimi (horseshoe crab/belangkas), serta membagikan 400 bibit pohon produktif. Kegiatan yang dilaksanakan di Ketapang Urban Aquaculture, Mauk, Tangerang, Banten tersebut sebagai wujud dari komitmen dan dukungan Perseroan terhadap upaya Pemerintah mengatasi perubahan iklim. The Company and the Coordinating Ministry for Maritime Affairs and Investment (Kemenko Marves) of the Republic of Indonesia supports the #TogetherHijaukanIndonesia Action by the activities of planting 15,000 mangrove seedlings on an area of 3 hectares, releasing 31 Agustus | August 31 mimi (horseshoe crab/mullet), and distributing 400 productive tree seedlings. The activities that were carried out at Ketapang Urban Aquaculture, Mauk, Tangerang, Banten are a manifestation of the Company’s commitment and support for the Government’s efforts to address climate change. Perseroan dengan mitra strategisnya membentuk suatu perusahaan patungan bernama PT Karya Tambang Sentosa yang bergerak di bidang pertambangan bijh nikel. Perseroan memiliki 36% kepemilikan saham dalam PT Karya Tambang Sentosa. The Company and its strategic partners formed a joint venture company called PT Karya Tambang Sentosa which is engaged in nickel ore mining. The Company has 36% share ownership in 1 September | September 1 PT Karya Tambang Sentosa. 16 PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk Laporan Tahunan 2023 Annual Report Perseroan meningkatkan kepemilikan saham di PT Gane Permai Sentosa (PT GPS) dari 70% menjadi 99% dengan membeli 6.090 lembar saham milik PT Harita Jayaraya. Transaksi tersebut diharapkan meningkatkan kontribusi finansial dan memperkuat laba bersih Perseroan dari PT GPS sebagai entitas anak PT Gane Permai Sentosa Perseroan yang bergerak di bidang pertambangan nikel. The Company increased its share ownership in PT Gane Permai Sentosa (PT GPS) from 70% to 99% by purchasing 6,090 shares 28 November | November 28 owned by PT Harita Jayaraya. This transaction is expected to increase the financial contribution and strengthen the Compa

evidence.shareholders: Shareholders (%): that the first phase of its KPS RKEF project was completed in 1Q25, while Phase 2, Harita Jayaraya 84.7 which consists of four lines already reaching 69% construction progress, is Public 14.4 scheduled to commence production in 4Q25, with total capacity of 60tpa while Citra Duta Jaya Makmur 0.9 Phase 3 reached 30% construction progess and is expected to reach COD by 1Q26. The project has total investment of USD 1.9bn. On the upstream side, the GTS mine (total investment: USD 0.5mn) is expected to begin operations in 2H25, and ores Stock Performance from the mine will be transported to a processing plant using tugs and barges. In (%) YTD 1M 3M 12M addition, NCKL, with total investment of USD 70mn, is constructing 600ktpa Absolute 32.5 53.8 44.9 7.0 quicklime plant, which is slated to begin production in 4Q25. We believe this facility JCI Return 12.2 11.9 13.8 6.8 will help further reduce HPAL operating costs, as its output will be used to support Relative 20.3 41.9 31.1 0.1 existing facility. Notably, all the above-mentioned projects are secure, fully funded by equity financing in a period when nickel prices were higher, alleviating execution risk and providing competitive advantage, particularly as most metal prices are Stock Price & Volumes, 12M currently downtrending. Retain BUY with higher TP of 1,300 on most attractive valuation in the sector. We fined tuned our forecasts revising up 2025-26F earnings by 15.2%-34.4%, before raising to a more manageable hike of 7.8% in 2027F, as we incorporate higher JV earnings coming from increased ONC ownership to 40% and adjust down our cash cost reflecting 1H25 improvement. We reiterate BUY on NCKL with SOTP-based target price of IDR 1,300, reflecting 26F P/E 8.3x and 30.6% upside. We remain positive to NCKL’s longer-tem outlook amidst weakening nickel prices, as we believe positive catalysts remain supported by 1) additional income from the planned KPS Company Background expansion, 2) contribution from GTS mine and 3) potential decline in HPAL cash Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL), costs thanks to the new quicklime plant. Hence, NCKL remains our top sector pick, established in September 2004 and listed in mainly on its lowest cash cost in the sector. Risks to our call include 1) Weaker than April 2023, is a key player in Indonesia's expected nickel prices on lower demand from China and 2) regulatory changes. nickel industry, focusing in processing Forecasts and Valuations (at IDR 995/share) (78.7% of total 1H25 revenues) and mining Y/E Dec 23A 24A 25F 26F 27F (21.3%). evidence.directors: Board of Directors Board of Directors Position Years of Experience Roy Arman Arfandy, an Indonesian citizen, has been serving as President Director of PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk since December 15, 2022. He holds Bachelor of Engineering from Hasanuddin University, Makassar (1991). His previous roles include President Director of PT Eurokars Motor President Director 8 Indonesia (2017–2020) and PT Bank Permata Tbk (2014– 2016). He also held various senior management positions at PT Bank Permata, PT Bank DBS Indonesia, and PT Bank Mizuho Indonesia. He holds no concurrent positions and has no affiliations with other companies. Suparsin Darmo Liwan was appointed Director of Finance at PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk on 15 December 2022. He holds Bachelor's degree in Accounting from Tarumanegara University and is a Certified Management Accountant (CMA) and Professional Financial Modeler. He also serves as Chief Finance Financial Officer of PT Halmahera Persada Lygend. His 10 Director previous experience includes roles in corporate finance and investor relations at PT ABM Investama Tbk and as an audit manager at KPMG. He has no financial, management, or family relationships with other Board members or Major Shareholders. Younsel Evand Roos was appointed Director of Operations at PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk on 15 December 2022. He holds Bachelor's degree in Mining Engineering from the Bandung Institute of Technology. He brings extensive experience in the mining sector, having served as General Director of Operations 35 Manager at PT Trimegah Bangun Persada (2013–2022) and previously as Senior Mine Engineer at PT Vale Indonesia Tbk. He has no financial, management, or family relationships with other Board members or Major Shareholders. Sources: Company, SSI Research www.samuel.co.id Page 10 of 17 Trimegah Bangun Persada Bloomberg: NCKL.IJ | Reuters: NCKL.JK Metal Mining Sector 15 August 2025 JCI Index 7,931 Cont’d Position Years of Experience Lim Sian Choo has been serving as Director of Sustainability at PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk since 15 December 2022. She holds Bachelor of Commerce and Administration from Victoria University, Wellington, New Zealand. Lim has a strong background in sustainability, having previously served Sustainability as Chief Sustainability Officer at Bumitama Agri Ltd Group. 12 Director She has also held various roles in corporate social responsibility and sustainability initiatives, including as Co- Chair of the Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil (RSPO) and the Peatland Working Group. She has no financial, management, or family relationships with other Board members or Major Shareholders. Tonny Hasudungan Gultom was appointed Director of Health, Safety, and Environment (HSE) at PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk on 15
evidence.commissioners: Board of Commissioners Board of Commissioners Position Years of Experience Donald J. Hermanus, an Indonesian citizen, has been serving as President Commissioner of PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk since December 15, 2022. He holds Bachelor of Law from Tarumanegara University, Jakarta (2020). In addition to his President role at TBP, he is the President Director of PT Halmahera Jaya 8 Commissioner Feronikel and Commissioner at both PT Jikodolong Megah Pertiwi and PT Obi Anugerah Mineral. He has no financial, management, or family relationships with other members of the Board or the Company's Major Shareholders. Darjoto Setyawan was appointed as Independent Commissioner of PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk on 15 December 2022. He holds Master of Management from Prasetiya Mulya and Bachelor's degree in Mathematics from the Bandung Institute of Technology. He also serves as Independent 7 President Director of PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk Commissioner and holds various commissioner roles at PT Atome Finance Indonesia. He has no financial, management, or family relationships with other Board members or Major Shareholders. Suryadi Sasmita was appointed Independent Commissioner of PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk on 21 January 2023. He holds multiple President Director roles at various companies, including PT Pulau Kelapa Sentosa, PT Kelapa Carita Island, PT Graha Bangun Karya (IBIS Styles BSD Hotel), PT Surya Mitra Commissioner 3 Perdana Graga, PT Sumber Makmur Lestari, PT Sentracakrawala Pusaka, and PT Indonesia Wacoal. He has no financial, management, or family relationships with other Board members or Major Shareholders.
